HeroSection.subtitle: Accounting, invoicing, payroll and connectivity. 100% adapted to Venezuelan regulations.

FeaturesSection.subtitle: We compare System Kyron against leading market platforms in response time.

ServicesSection.subtitle: Interconnected solutions covering accounting, invoicing, legal, telecommunications and artificial intelligence.

features.title: Accounting & Tax
features.subtitle: VEN-NIF · SENIAT · ISLR
features.description: Complete accounting system with legal books, Venezuelan chart of accounts, automatic IVA 16%, IGTF 3% and ISLR calculation. Compliant with the current Official Gazette.

features.title: AES-256 Security
features.subtitle: Military Encryption · JWT · Audit
features.description: Bank-grade security infrastructure. AES-256 encryption, JWT authentication with HTTP-only cookies, and an immutable log of every action.

features.title: Artificial Intelligence
features.subtitle: Kyron AI · Claude (Anthropic)
features.description: AI powered by Claude from Anthropic. Tax monitoring of the Official Gazette, smart accounting assistant, predictive cash-flow analysis, and automatic executive report generation.

ServicesSection.platform_subtitle: Venezuela's most robust infrastructure for comprehensive corporate management.

AboutUsSection.subtitle: Software engineering designed for operational excellence and full regulatory compliance.

FaqSection.subtitle: The most common questions about the System Kyron ecosystem.

items.question: How do you guarantee tax compliance?
items.answer: We monitor the Official Gazette with AI. IVA 16%, IGTF 3% and ISLR are calculated automatically according to current VEN-NIF regulations.

items.question: Can I manage multiple companies?
items.answer: Yes. The Partners portal lets you consolidate the accounting of multiple entities into a unified Command Center.

items.question: How does the BCV rate work?
items.answer: It updates automatically. Every invoice generates its USD equivalent with the current BCV rate.

items.question: Is it hard to migrate my data?
items.answer: No. For standard systems (Excel, Profit, Monica), migration is completed in less than 48 hours at no extra cost.

items.question: What level of security do you have?
items.answer: AES-256 encryption, JWT authentication with HTTP-only cookies, and an immutable audit log for every action.

HowItWorksSection.subtitle: We interconnect the world's most advanced language models to offer you absolute precision in accounting, legal, and analysis.

capabilities.title: Smart Fiscal Assistant
capabilities.description: Deep analysis of the Official Gazette, tax laws, and SENIAT compliance. Complex queries resolved in seconds.
capabilities.demo_user: What is the ISLR withholding limit for professional services according to Decree 1.808?
capabilities.demo_system: Consulting Official Gazette and VEN-NIF Legal Base...
capabilities.demo_ai: For professional services paid to resident natural persons, the withholding is 3% on the excess of 83.33 UT. If it is a domiciled legal entity, it is 5% on the total amount paid.

capabilities.title: Document Generator
capabilities.description: Create contracts, assembly minutes, and legal powers with legal validity. Impeccable technical drafting adapted to civil regulations.
capabilities.demo_user: Generate an arbitration clause for a service contract in Caracas.
capabilities.demo_ai: Any controversy derived from this contract will be resolved through legal arbitration, in accordance with the Regulations of the Caracas Chamber Arbitration Center, by one (1) arbitrator appointed according to said Regulations.

capabilities.title: Data & Flow Analysis
capabilities.description: Financial projections, anomaly detection in transactions, and cash flow optimization using neural networks.
capabilities.demo_ai: I have detected an anomaly in the 'Operating Expenses' item. Electric service payments have increased by 45% compared to the previous quarter without a correlative increase in production. I recommend a consumption audit.
